action.reasoning: Observation: Train failed with TypeError on ReduceLROnPlateau(verbose=True) - deprecated in recent torch; prior best test AUC 0.7547 (val 0.7568) with h=256/l=2. No training occurred this iter (only 6s wasted). Analysis: Model capacity was still limiting before; h=512/l=3/d=0.2 + scheduler + 30eps should improve without OOM (params ~10M <<1B). Curves show steady loss drop. Decision: Rewrite complete fixed train.py (remove verbose, ensure full save logic + logging), keep model.py/predict.py, run training, then submit_eval on best_model.pt to get new score and measure ~2min iter time.
